title: Need my help? - Justin Madders
meta_description: Labour MP for Ellesmere Port & Bromborough
text_excerpt: Need my help? - Justin Madders Skip to main content Justin Madders Labour MP for Ellesmere Port & Bromborough Join Get Involved Donate About Contact News In Parliament Need my help? Privacy Policy More Menu Need my help? Let's get some details Use the form below to provide details for any issues you want me to look into on your behalf. Remember, I can only work on behalf of constituents in Ellesmere Port & Neston, you can click here to confirm whether I am your MP. Name * First Last Address * Address Line 1 Address Line 2 Town/City Postcode Email Would you like to sign up to receive my monthly email newsletter? Yes No Phone number Am I your MP? Yes If you are writing for support with a specific issue that you need my help with, Parliamentary protocol dictates that matters should be dealt with by a constituent's own Member of Parliament. You can click here to confirm whether I am your MP. Please describe the issue you need support with: IMPORTANT: If you would like me to contact Jobcentre Plus, the Department for Work and Pensions or HM Revenue and Customs for you then I will also need your National Insurance number and your date of birth. Who have you contacted regarding this issue and what was the result? I give my consent for the personal information I submit on this form to be used in accordance with the privacy policies identified below: * Yes I respect your right to privacy. The personal information that I hold about you is governed by legal regulations. My Privacy Policy sets out what information I hold, for what reason, how it is stored and how you can query this with me. I will retain the information submitted on this form for the reasons you have contacted me. You can read my Privacy Policy here . By completing this form, you give me permission to contact you and use the information that you have provided. This is a Labour Party Wordpress Network website. The Labour Party Wordpress Network has it's own privacy policy which you can read here Justin Madders Contact details 31 Whitby Road, Ellesmere Port, UK View on Google Maps Email: justin.madders.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Sue Pugh on behalf of Justin Madders, both at 31 Whitby Road, Ellesmere Port, CH65 0AA ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
